ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the contributor */,
  "born" INTEGER /* Birth year of the contributor */,
  "died" INTEGER /* Death year of the contributor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the contributor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the contributor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "area_of_study" TEXT /* Area of study related to the contribution (e.g., fisheries population dynamics, ecosystem modeling) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation or reference to the contribution */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Brief description of the impact of the contribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_area_of_study FOREIGN KEY ("area_of_study") REFERENCES areas_of_study ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas_of_study" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area of study */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area of study */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent area of study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_of_study_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES areas_of_study ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_historia" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_historia_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_historia_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)
